name: list_domains
description: List all domains in your Namecheap account with their registration details, expiry dates, and status.

response_example.body: <ApiResponse Status="OK"><CommandResponse><DomainGetListResult><Domain ID="12345" Name="example.com" User="myuser" Created="01/15/2024" Expires="01/15/2025" IsExpired="false" AutoRenew="true" /></DomainGetListResult></CommandResponse></ApiResponse>
